name: @powerhousedao/op-hub
description: Operational Hub package containing all relevant document models and app drives

config.name: REQUEST_FINANCE_API_KEY
config.description: API key for the Request Finance SaaS. Read by the invoice subgraph's `requestDirectPayment` resolver (via scripts/invoice/requestFinance.ts) to create invoices on the external platform. Obtain from your Request Finance account settings.

config.name: REQUEST_FINANCE_EMAIL
config.description: Email address associated with the Request Finance account. Sent as the requestor identity when the invoice subgraph creates invoices.

config.name: ALCHEMY_API_KEY
config.description: Alchemy RPC API key. Used by scripts/alchemy/* (Alchemy environment + helpers) to query on-chain data and by account-transactions / accounts editors. Obtain from the Alchemy dashboard.

config.name: CLAUDE_API_KEY
config.description: Anthropic Claude API key. Used by scripts/invoice/pdfToClaudeAI.ts to extract invoice data from PDF uploads. Obtain from console.anthropic.com.

config.name: SIGNER_PRIVATE_KEY
config.description: Ethereum private key used to sign Gnosis Safe transactions in scripts/invoice/gnosisTransactionBuilder.ts. Store only in OpenBao — never commit or log.

config.name: SAFE_API_KEY
config.description: Safe Transaction Service API key used by scripts/invoice/gnosisTransactionBuilder.ts when proposing transactions to a Safe.

config.name: PRODUCTION_SAFE_ADDRESS
config.description: Gnosis Safe address (0x-prefixed) used by scripts/invoice/gnosisTransactionBuilder.ts when NODE_ENV=production.

config.name: DEV_STAGING_SAFE_ADDRESS
config.description: Gnosis Safe address (0x-prefixed) used by scripts/invoice/gnosisTransactionBuilder.ts when NODE_ENV is not `production` (dev / staging).

config.name: PH_CONNECT_URL
config.description: URL of the Connect application. Used by the resources-services subgraph to generate drive links.

config.name: PH_SWITCHBOARD_URL
config.description: URL of the Switchboard application. Used by the resources-services subgraph to generate drive links.
